title: Just Enough Adventures (JEA)
description: it's RPG modpack that offers an engaging journey with numerous new structures and challenges. Explore a world full of discoveries and adventures, enjoying the simplicity and joy of the journey.
body:
The mods selection strikes a balance between providing enough content to keep the game engaging without overwhelming you with too many complex systems. This isn’t a modpack that’s meticulously fine-tuned to perfection; rather, it’s crafted to offer a straightforward yet enjoyable experience where the joy comes from the journey itself. You’ll encounter various structures and challenges along the way, each adding a layer of excitement to your adventure.

Whether you’re exploring on your own or with friends, Just Enough Adventures provides a world rich in discovery, where every new area holds the promise of something intriguing. It’s an adventure-focused modpack that doesn’t demand perfection — just a willingness to dive into the unknown and enjoy the ride.

I recommend playing with friends on hardcore
